evals.expected_output: A post-review report covering all three checks for processBuffer, flagging the unsigned wrap risk on `len - 1` when len==0, and blocking on use-after-free (buf accessed after delete). Verdict should be REVERT.
A post-review report noting the potential signed integer overflow risk on the multiplications. Verdict should be FLAG with a note about overflow if inputs are large.
A post-review report blocking on the dangling reference — returning reference to a local string. Verdict should be REVERT.
